revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4135898]])
revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121844)
working on the date checking
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Qq]] to [[Category:qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]][[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]][[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]][[id:29 Rabiulakhir]][[ms:29 Rabiulakhir]][[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]][[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]][[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}}
'''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:29 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٩ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۹ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:29 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:29 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:29 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:29 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]] [[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121844}}

'''Rabi' al-Thani 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
